data.title: Tourism, Philanthropy, and Championship Golf Take Center Stage at the Governor Albert Bryan Jr. Golf Classic Weekend in St. Croix
data.description: Over the weekend, St. Croix in the U.S. Virgin Islands hosted the Governor Albert Bryan Jr. Golf Classic, attracting numerous guests, golf enthusiasts, and local leaders. The event, spanning three days, was a triumph bringing the community together.

data.title: Sanuwave Will Host a Conference Call on March 27, 2026 at 8:30 AM (ET) to Present Q4 and Full Year 2025 Financial Results
data.description: Sanuwave has scheduled a conference call for March 27, 2025, at 8:30 AM (ET) to disclose their financial performance for Q4 and the entirety of 2025. The call will provide an overview of the company's financial results, including revenue, expenses, and overall performance for the period. Investors and analysts are invited to participate in the call to gain insights into Sanuwave's financial standing and future outlook. This communication serves as an opportunity for stakeholders to engage with company executives, ask questions, and better understand the financial health and strategic direction of Sanuwave moving forward.

data.title: Belgium: TotalEnergies and Holcim Inaugurate Europe’s Largest Floating Solar Power Plant Dedicated to Self-Consumption
data.description: In Paris and Obourg, Belgium, TotalEnergies and Holcim unveiled a floating solar power plant boasting a capacity of 31 megawatts. Situated in Obourg on a revitalized former chalk quarry turned lake, the plant produces 30 gigawatt-hours annually, providing renewable electricity for Holcim's operations. This makes it the biggest floating solar power facility and showcases their commitment to sustainable construction. TotalEnergies trades on Paris, London, and New York stock exchanges under TTE.

data.title: Aptiv Announces Pricing Terms of Cash Tender Offer
data.description: A technology company, Aptiv PLC, based in Schaffhausen, Switzerland, and listed on NYSE as APTV, has revealed the pricing details for a cash tender offer called the “Tender Offer.” This offer is made by their wholly-owned subsidiary, Aptiv Swiss Holdings Limited, a Jersey-based private limited company. The offer aims to buy back certain outstanding notes. The specific notes targeted in this offer are as follows:- The company is focused on fostering a more automated, electrified, and digitized future.

data.title: White House proposes national AI framework focusing on six policy areas, including copyright and energy, with reduced regulations.
data.description: Six policy areas are emphasized in the legislative recommendations, covering copyright, energy, and workforce development. The recommendations also indicate a more relaxed regulatory approach.

data.title: Huron Announces Ekta Singh-Bushell Will Step Down From its Board of Directors at the Completion of Her Current Term
data.description: In Chicago on March 20, 2026, Ekta Singh-Bushell, a director at Huron Consulting Group Inc. since 2019, announced her resignation from the Board of Directors after the current term. She will not seek re-election at the upcoming Annual Meeting of Stockholders scheduled for May 8, 2026. Ms. Singh-Bushell has been appreciated for her significant contributions during her tenure on the Board.

data.title: S&P Global: Era of Linear Energy Transition Has Ended as AI Demand and Geopolitics Reshape Markets
data.description: A recent publication was launched prior to the 44th Annual CERAWeek to examine the conflicting influences shaping energy markets and the effects of persistent geopolitical instability. This analysis comes at a critical time with ongoing conflicts in the Middle East, a region of significant historical importance in the global energy landscape.
